name: Maze Survivor   Platform Adventure Game
description: Maze Survivor is a fun 2D platform adventure game where players must explore maze-like levels, find the hidden key, and reach the home safely. Avoid dangerous animals, flying birds, and lava traps while completing more than 30 challenging levels. Use your timing and skills to survive and unlock the next level.
instructions: Desktop Left Arrow ndash Move Left Right Arrow ndash Move Right Up Arrow ndash Jump Mobile Tablet Touch Left ndash Move Left Touch Right ndash Move Right Tap on Center ndash Jump
